title: Animal adventure: part 1
text: Once upon a time there was a little fox. The fox lived in a big forest. Every day the fox played with his friends. They ran and laughed all day long!
tips: Picture the fox as you type

character_tips.anna: Block 4! Real stories. Picture each scene as you type.
